meta.title: K-Saju Pet | Pet K-Saju
meta.description: Discover your pet's zodiac and destiny — global pet community meets K-Saju storytelling.

saju.hubSubtitle: Korean manse calendar readings, pet-parent compatibility, and character cards with elemental storytelling for global pet parents.
saju.zodiacSubtitle: Find your pet's Western zodiac by birth date, then blend it with K-Saju elements for a daily KST-based fortune.
saju.compatibilitySubtitle: Compare your pet's and your elemental charts to reveal bond score, supportive clashes, and care tips.
saju.premiumHubSubtitle: Detailed MBTI, zodiac fortune, and pet–butler bond — all in one unlock.
saju.premiumSubtitle: When you're happy, your pet is too. A premium life-strategy report crafted only for butlers.
